productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Peach Printed Top
description: Style Note We like our clothes to make a statement. Make a casually confident one with this simple and well fitted top from tokyo talkies. Pair it with jeans or shorts and wear a comfortable pair of flip flops to carry off the look completely. Product Description Dark peach T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves and graphic print in front Material and Care 100% cotton Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach and drip dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
